name: go-game
author: igrek51
description: Classic 9x9 Go board game. Play against AI or another player.

pebble.longDescription:
Play the ancient game of Go on your Pebble smartwatch. Features:
- Full 9x9 board with proper Go rules
- AI opponent with intelligent move selection
- Player vs Player mode
- AI vs AI demonstration mode
- Chinese scoring rules with configurable komi
- Ko rule enforcement
- Score estimation during gameplay
- Easy-to-use navigation with row/column selection

Perfect for quick games and practicing your Go strategy on the go!
